features.featureTitle: In frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, fix the `useIsCallerAdmin` query so it: (1) is enabled only when the user is authenticated (identity is available), (2) uses the authenticated actor (not anonymous) to call the backend `isCallerAdmin()` function, (3) includes the identity/principal as a query key dependency so it re-fetches automatically when the user logs in or out, and (4) has a short staleTime (e.g. 0 or 5000ms) so it re-fetches on mount after login.

In frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx, fix the Admin Panel link visibility: (1) call `useIsCallerAdmin` at the top of the component, (2) after login completes, ensure the query result is awaited before deciding whether to show the link, (3) conditionally render the 'Admin Panel' link (navigating to /admin) in both the desktop nav and mobile hamburger menu only when `isLoggedIn === true` AND `isCallerAdmin === true`, (4) do not render the link during the loading state of the admin check to avoid flicker.
